settings.text: A small studio for the Indian kitchen
Quiet order for everyday kitchens. Crafted containers designed in Bengaluru, built to last a lifetime.
“We make the containers we wished existed for our own kitchens.”

Pankui was started in 2025 by a design-led team in Bengaluru, tired of choosing between cheap and ugly or expensive and imported. Every piece is built for Indian kitchens, Indian humidity, Indian pantries.
“Finally, a spice rack that doesn't look like it belongs in a hostel.”
“The fridge set transformed how my kitchen looks. Worth every rupee.”
“Beautiful, sturdy, and the canisters survived my toddler. Buying more.”
